# Auto-generated by modulestrap — safe to customize.
#
# MiniWin/miniwin_debug.c is deliberately NOT listed below — its
# mw_debug_print_assert() draws a crude built-in message then hangs in an
# unescapable while(true){}, with no purr_crash_guard integration
# (confirmed live: this is why a UI freeze could show no panic screen at
# all). hal/purr_os/miniwin_debug_purr.c implements the same function
# signature instead, redirecting every MW_ASSERT() failure into the real
# panic system. The vendored file itself is left untouched in the MiniWin/
# tree (still upstream-clean, matches module.pcat's "no per-device forks"
# policy) — it's just not compiled.
idf_component_register(
    SRCS
        miniwin_module.c
        miniwin_win.c
        miniwin_wince_desktop.c
        miniwin_wince_icons.c
        miniwin_cursor.c
        miniwin_keyboard.c
        MiniWin/miniwin.c
        MiniWin/miniwin_message_queue.c
        MiniWin/miniwin_settings.c
        MiniWin/miniwin_touch.c
        MiniWin/miniwin_tree_container.c
        MiniWin/miniwin_utilities.c
        MiniWin/calibrate.c
        MiniWin/hal/hal_init.c
        MiniWin/gl/gl.c
        MiniWin/gl/fonts/bitmapped/font9.c
        MiniWin/gl/fonts/bitmapped/font12.c
        MiniWin/gl/fonts/bitmapped/font16.c
